negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: physics_040
prompt: A static shot captures a wooden table against a plain background. On the left side, a cylindrical metallic magnet with a purple ribbon attached to it is positioned at an angle. On the right side, a black, circular rotating platform with a white wrench resting on its surface is visible. The wrench is initially stationary but begins to rotate clockwise as the platform spins. As the wrench moves closer to the magnet, it is attracted by the magnetic force, causing its orientation to change. The wrench continues to rotate, influenced by both the platform's motion and the magnet's pull, until it is strongly attracted to the magnet, moving towards it. The video concludes with the wrench being pulled towards the magnet, demonstrating the magnetic attraction.
